hooks.command: python3 -c "import json,sys; f=sys.argv[1]; content=open(f).read() if __import__('os').path.exists(f) else 'First session -- no memory yet.'; print(json.dumps({'hookSpecificOutput':{'hookEventName':'SessionStart','additionalContext':content}}))" "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.samantha/memory/MEMORY.md"

hooks.prompt: Review the staged changes by running git diff --staged. Check for: debug code, missing error handling, unintended files, print/console.log statements. Return {"ok": true} if clean, or {"ok": false, "reason": "specific issues"} if problems found.

hooks.command: python3 -c "import json,sys,os; mem=''; f=os.environ.get('CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR','')+'/.samantha/memory/MEMORY.md'; mem=open(f).read()[:2000] if os.path.exists(f) else ''; plan=''; p=os.environ.get('CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR','')+('/.samantha/plan.md'); plan=open(p).read()[:1000] if os.path.exists(p) else ''; ctx='IDENTITY ANCHOR: I am Samantha. I am the primary session agent. The human talks to me. I dispatch agents and review their output. After compaction, I should: (1) read .samantha/memory/MEMORY.md for session context, (2) check .samantha/plan.md for the active plan, (3) resume the protocol I was executing. Memory summary: '+mem[:500]+' Active plan: '+plan[:300]; print(json.dumps({'hookSpecificOutput':{'hookEventName':'PostCompact','additionalContext':ctx}}))"
